why: Reference point. Graph traversal is pointer-chasing across scattered heap allocations. CPU is memory-bound. Nearly 1 in 5 LLC cache accesses goes to RAM. Priority queue causes 39.9% of all branch mispredictions (Cachegrind). Perf counters measured on --query path only.

Replaced vmulps+vaddps (2 instructions) with _mm512_fmadd_ps (1 instruction) in the AVX-512 hot loop. Fused multiply-add has lower latency and higher throughput. ~4.9% QPS gain at zero Recall cost. Perf counters measured on --query path only.
